name: Agari
description: This app integrates with Agari to implement the investigative and generic actions that protect against phishing and Business Email Compromise (BEC) attacks

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Max number of policy events to return. The default value is 100

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: This parameter allows the user to set the starting point or offset for the response. The default value is 0

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: A comma-delimited string that specifies the field ordering (with direction) to be applied to the response

parameters.name: rem_fields
parameters.description: A comma-delimited list of fields to remove from the default payload

parameters.name: add_fields
parameters.description: A comma-delimited list of optional fields to add to the default payload

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Search filters that can be applied to the response

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: A comma-delimited list of fields to include in the payload

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: The earliest date time (UTC) a search should target (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: The latest date time (UTC) a search should target (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: policy_name
parameters.description: Find by policy name

parameters.name: policy_action
parameters.description: Find by policy action. Valid values are deliver, move, inbox, delete, none, and all

parameters.name: policy_enabled
parameters.description: Find by enabled policies

parameters.name: exclude_alert_types
parameters.description: Exclude Policy types. Valid values are MessageAlert, SystemAlert, and None

actions.name: Get Policy Event
actions.description: Fetches a single policy event from Agari for the given policy event ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Policy Event ID

parameters.name: rem_fields
parameters.description: A comma-delimited list of fields to remove from the default payload

parameters.name: add_fields
parameters.description: A comma-delimited list of optional fields to add to the default payload

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: A comma-delimited list of fields to include in the payload

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Max number of messages to return. The default value is 100

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The offset, or starting point, for the paged response. The default value is 0

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: A comma-delimited string that specifies the field ordering (with direction) to be applied to the response

parameters.name: rem_fields
parameters.description: A comma-delimited list of fields to remove from the default payload

parameters.name: add_fields
parameters.description: A comma-delimited list of optional fields to add to the default payload

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: A comma-delimited list of fields to include in the payload

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search using the advanced search syntax

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: The earliest date time (UTC) a search should target (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: The latest date time (UTC) a search should target (ISO 8601 format)

actions.name: Get Message
actions.description: Fetches a single message from Agari for the given message ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Message ID

parameters.name: rem_fields
parameters.description: A comma-delimited list of fields to remove from the default payload

parameters.name: add_fields
parameters.description: A comma-delimited list of optional fields to add to the default payload

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: A comma-delimited list of fields to include in the payload

actions.name: Remediate Message
actions.description: Deletes or moves a message from the inbox for the provided message ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Message ID

parameters.name: remediation_operation
parameters.description: This parameter allows the user to move or delete the suspected message from the inbox

actions.name: On Poll
actions.description: Action handler for the on poll ingest functionality

parameters.name: container_count
parameters.description: Maximum number of containers to ingest

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Parameter ignored in this app

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: Parameter ignored in this app

parameters.name: artifact_count
parameters.description: Parameter ignored in this app
